language.heading: Choose your language
language.subheading: Select the language you're most comfortable with

step1.title: Tell us about your product
step1.body: Describe what you sell, the price, your offer, and who buys it — in your own words.

step2.title: BriefAI creates your content
step2.body: We generate an Instagram caption, WhatsApp message, and a campaign image — all ready to use.

step3.title: Copy it or post directly
step3.body: Copy your message, download your image, or post straight to Instagram.

business.heading: What is your business called?
business.helper: This helps BriefAI personalize your content.
business.placeholder: e.g. Sharma Jewellers, Sri Dosa House

validation.required: Please tell us your business name.
validation.tooShort: Business name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.tooLong: Business name must be under 50 characters.

error.authFailed: Something went wrong getting you started.
